Title: Requires insurance carriers to provide access to underwriting models or granular claim data to the department of financial services
Summary: Requires insurance carriers to provide access to underwriting models or granular claim data to the department of financial services to evaluate underwriting practices and risk assessment methodologies.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the insurance law, in relation to requiring insurance carriers to provide access to underwriting models or granular claim data to the department of financial services
